accordion.paymentBody:
For high-value payments, the card issuer may call to verify your purchase.

If the verification process indicates a stolen card or unauthorized order, the order may be held or cancelled.

For bank transfer payments, you can transfer the product cost via PC banking, internet banking, phone banking, or in person at the nearest bank.

The depositor name entered at order must match the actual depositor; payment must be made within 7 days, otherwise the order will be automatically cancelled.
accordion.shippingNote1: Average delivery takes 1-2 days; please note delays may occur depending on the carrier.
accordion.shippingNote2: Jeju / remote island areas may take a bit longer.
accordion.shippingNote3: Jeju / remote island areas may require additional fees.
accordion.shippingNote4: Your order will be shipped after payment is confirmed.
accordion.shippingNote5: Note that some products may experience slight shipping delays.
accordion.returnable1: - Within 7 days after receiving the product
accordion.returnable2: - However, electronics that have been opened or had packaging damaged in a way that loses product value cannot be exchanged/returned.
accordion.returnable3: - If the delivered product/service differs from what was advertised, within 3 months of delivery or within 30 days of becoming aware
accordion.notReturnable1: - When the product is lost or damaged due to the customer's responsibility (except where packaging was opened to confirm contents)
accordion.notReturnable2: - When packaging was opened or damaged in a way that loses product value (e.g., electronics, food, music; defective pixels on laptops/LCD monitors/digital cameras follow the manufacturer's policy)
accordion.notReturnable3: - When the product value is significantly reduced by the customer's use or partial consumption (cosmetics: only when a trial product was provided)
accordion.notReturnable4: - When the product value is significantly reduced over time, making resale difficult
accordion.notReturnable5: - When packaging of copyable products is damaged (for details, please use customer service 1:1 email)
accordion.exchangeNotice:
※ If you change your mind and request exchange/return, the return shipping cost is the customer's responsibility.
(Includes color/size exchanges)

header.title: Customer Service
header.subtitle: If you have any questions, feel free to contact us anytime.

1.question: How long does delivery take?
1.answer: On average, delivery is completed within 2-3 days. Remote/island areas may take an additional 1-2 days.

2.question: Where can I track my delivery?
2.answer: Check real-time delivery status in My Page > Orders/Delivery. We also send delivery notifications to the contact you provided at checkout.

3.question: How do I exchange or return an item?
3.answer: You can request an exchange/return within 7 days of delivery from My Page > Orders/Delivery. Return shipping costs may apply for change-of-mind returns.

4.question: When will I get my refund?
4.answer: After the returned item arrives at our warehouse and is inspected, refunds are processed within 1-2 days. The refund time may vary depending on the payment method.

5.question: How do I withdraw my membership?
5.answer: You can withdraw at My Page > Edit Profile > Withdraw. All accumulated points and coupons will be forfeited.

6.question: What payment methods are available?
6.answer: We support credit/debit card, real-time bank transfer, virtual account, KakaoPay, NaverPay, TossPay, and more.

7.question: How do I use my points?
7.answer: Points can be used at checkout. They are available from 1,000 KRW, with restrictions on some products.

8.question: When will out-of-stock items be restocked?
8.answer: Restock schedules vary by product. You can request a restock alert on the product detail page to be notified.

q1.question: What is Almondyoung Membership?
q1.answer: Almondyoung Membership is a subscription service. For 4,990 KRW/month you can enjoy a variety of special benefits.

q2.question: What new content will be added?
q2.answer: We're continuously adding new content beyond our 'coming soon' benefits to deliver even more value.

q3.question: How much does membership cost?
q3.answer: 4,990 KRW/month or 49,900 KRW/year (2 months free). Current benefits alone guarantee over 5,000 KRW of value.

q4.question: How will I be billed?
q4.answer: We use auto-billing via debit or credit card; you can change the payment method any time.

q5.question: How can I cancel?
q5.answer: Cancel from My Page > Membership. You can keep using the service until the end of the billing month, after which it ends automatically.
